title: InitProject
description: Before a project can use specd, it needs a valid `specd.yaml`, storage directories, and gitignore entries ŌĆö bootstrapping that must happen through a single coordinated operation. `InitProject` is the use case that handles this by delegating to the `ConfigWriter` port to write `specd.yaml`, create required storage directories, and update `.gitignore`. It is the entry point for `specd init` and the only use case that creates a project configuration from scratch.
context: Before a project can use specd, it needs a valid `specd.yaml`, storage directories, and gitignore entries ŌĆö bootstrapping that must happen through a single coordinated operation. `InitProject` is the use case that handles this by delegating to the `ConfigWriter` port to write `specd.yaml`, create required storage directories, and update `.gitignore`. It is the entry point for `specd init` and the only use case that creates a project configuration from scratch.

rules:
`execute(input)` MUST accept an `InitProjectOptions` object with the following fields:

- `projectRoot` (string, required) ŌĆö absolute path to the directory to initialise.
- `schemaRef` (string, required) ŌĆö schema reference string to write into `specd.yaml` (e.g. `"@specd/schema-std"`).
- `workspaceId` (string, required) ŌĆö the default workspace name (e.g. `"default"`).
- `specsPath` (string, required) ŌĆö relative path for the specs directory (e.g. `"specs/"`).
- `force` (boolean, optional) ŌĆö when `true`, overwrite an existing `specd.yaml` without error.

On successful execution, `execute` MUST return an `InitProjectResult` containing:

- `configPath` ŌĆö absolute path to the created `specd.yaml`.
- `schemaRef` ŌĆö the schema reference as written.
- `workspaces` ŌĆö array of workspace IDs created.

The use case MUST delegate all filesystem operations to the `ConfigWriter.initProject` method. It SHALL NOT perform any filesystem I/O directly. The use case is a thin orchestration layer over the port.
When `specd.yaml` already exists at the target path and `force` is not `true`, the use case MUST propagate the `AlreadyInitialisedError` thrown by the `ConfigWriter` port.

rules.requirement: Side effects performed by the port
rules:
The `ConfigWriter.initProject` implementation MUST:

- Write `specd.yaml` with the provided schema reference, workspace, and specs path.
- Create standard storage directories (`changes/`, `drafts/`, `discarded/`, `archive/`).
- Append both `specd.local.yaml` and the `specd.local.*.yaml` local-variant pattern to `.gitignore`.

constraints: The use case has no business logic beyond delegation ŌĆö it is a pass-through to the port.
InitProject is constructed with a single dependency: a ConfigWriter instance.
The use case is async ŌĆö it returns Promise<InitProjectResult>.

scenarios.name: All required fields provided
when: execute is called with projectRoot, schemaRef, workspaceId, and specsPath
then: the call succeeds and the options are forwarded to ConfigWriter.initProject

scenarios.name: Successful initialisation returns result
when: execute is called with valid options and no existing config
then: the returned object contains configPath, schemaRef, and workspaces
AND configPath is an absolute path ending in specd.yaml
AND workspaces includes the provided workspaceId

scenarios.name: Port receives the input verbatim
when: execute is called with an InitProjectOptions object
then: ConfigWriter.initProject is called exactly once with the same options object
AND the use case performs no other I/O

scenarios.name: Config already exists without force flag
when: execute is called with force absent or false

scenarios.name: Config already exists with force flag
when: execute is called with force: true
then: the existing config is overwritten and a successful result is returned

scenarios.name: Already initialised project propagates port error
given: the port throws AlreadyInitialisedError when checking existence
then: execute propagates AlreadyInitialisedError from the port

scenarios.requirement: Side effects performed by the port
scenarios.name: Storage directories created
then: the changes/, drafts/, discarded/, and archive/ directories exist under the storage path

scenarios.requirement: Side effects performed by the port
scenarios.name: Gitignore entries added
then: specd.local.yaml is listed in the project's .gitignore
AND the specd.local.*.yaml local-variant pattern is also listed
